title: Spicy Tagine Chicken
description: A Thai-inspired chicken dish with a flavorful tagine sauce, made with aromatic spices and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: Heat the intensely flavored olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the dash tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth, coconut milk, fish sauce, brown sugar, and red pepper flakes to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until heated through.
Serve the chicken with the tagine sauce spooned over the top.
